source: DFM Current vs. Dream Time Allocations (XLSX) — which tool supports which shift

role_key_notes.Producers: Coordination 74.5% → 41%. Freed time → Client Strategy, Creative QC, Innovation Lab.
role_key_notes.Post Production Managers: Reactive 1:1s → intentional editor management; more hiring/onboarding.
role_key_notes.Creative Directors: Preproduction 29% → 50%. V1 Review, Non-creative meetings, ClickUp, Post-pub → 0%.

CD-1.dream_impact_short: Shifts time from manual retention analysis into higher-value preproduction (ideation, scripting).

CD-2.dream_impact_short: Outlier ideation automated; more time for creative decisions and packaging.

CD-4.dream_impact_short: Post-publication monitoring automated; frees CD from manual competitor tracking.

CD-5.dream_impact_short: Instant packaging feedback; less back-and-forth, more time in preproduction.

CD-6.dream_impact_short: Client-specific knowledge on tap; consistent ideation without manual lookups.

CD-7.dream_impact_short: Script voice matching reduces revision cycles; more time in high-value preproduction.

CD-8.dream_impact_short: Slack-based scoring reduces meetings and ad-hoc reviews.

CD-9.dream_impact_short: Per-client outlier dashboard; research time → creative time.

ED-1.dream_impact_short: Sentiment visibility reduces reactive 1:1s; supports intentional editor management.

ED-2.dream_impact_short: Automated QC reduces manual review burden; fewer revision cycles.

ED-3.dream_impact_short: Capacity-based assignment reduces ClickUp admin and idle/waiting time.

PR-1.dream_impact_short: Timeline calculator reduces manual scheduling; supports Client Strategy and Innovation Lab.
PR-1.current_vs_dream: ClickUp Administration 38% → 18%; freed time → Client Relationship & Strategy 10%, Innovation Lab 10%.

PR-2.dream_impact_short: Sentiment tracker supports Client Relationship & Strategy and early escalation.

PR-3.dream_impact_short: Templated Slack reduces manual comms; frees time for strategy and QC.

PR-4.dream_impact_short: Claude-to-ClickUp agent cuts manual task creation; biggest lever for coordination reduction.
